case_title: NAKANO, IRENE MISS VS CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRAN: SFPD OFFICER DONALD FORTE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $699.00 FILED BY NAKANO, IRENE MISS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRAN: SFPD OFFICER DONALD FORTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-07-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF OCT-10-1997 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PLTF DECLARATION: DEFT CCSF: SFPD OFFICER DONALD FORTE WAS NOT SERVED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRAN: SFPD OFFICER DONALD FORTE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-07-1997, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-17-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S HEAR- ING BRIEF FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAKANO, IRENE MISS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRAN: SFPD OFFICER DONALD FORTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
